song.title: Whate'er My God Ordains Is Right
song.author: Samuel Rodigast / David Braud
song.lyrics:
[v1] .C G/B Am F Whate'er my God ordains is right. .F G F C Holy His will abideth. .C G/B Am F I will be still whate'er He does, .F G F C G/B And follow where He guideth. .Am D G Am F E He is my God, though dark my road. .C G/B Am F He holds me that I shall not fall .F G C G Wherefore to Him I leave it all.
[v2] Whate'er my God ordains is right. He never will deceive me. He leads me by the proper path, I know He will not leave me. I take, content, what He hath sent. His hand can turn my griefs away And patiently I wait His day.
[v3] Whate'er my God ordains is right. Here shall my stand be taken Though sorrow, need, or death be mine. Yet I am not forsaken. My God is true, each morn anew. Sweet comfort yet shall fill my heart And pain and sorrow shall depart.
